steps.title: Identify the time-based contrast
steps.content: The metro expanded during the 2020s, yet will still need further expansions. This creates a concessive relationship: despite recent action, more will be needed.

steps.title: Select the transition for this relationship
steps.content:
The logical relationship is concession: something happened recently, yet more is still needed. The blank needs a word meaning "nevertheless" or "even so."
  • "Still,": signals that a situation persists despite what just happened — fits the concessive relationship. ✓
  • "By contrast,": signals a direct opposition between two different things; no two things are being contrasted here. ✗
  • "For example,": signals an example is coming; the second sentence adds a new point, not an illustration. ✗
  • "Instead,": signals a substitution or reversal; the second sentence is additional, not a replacement. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
